tasks.title: Listen Layer Paper: ALME conflict patching on Qwen2-Audio
News: Power Steering: Behavior Steering via Layer-to-Layer Jacobia
tasks.definition_of_done: Read and note key insights. Source: https://www.alignmentforum.org/posts/power-steering-jacobian-singular-vectors

tasks.title: GCBench-14 real Whisper run: port gsae_boundary_mock.py to actual Whisper-base hidden states (3s LibriSpeech CPU)
tasks.definition_of_done: Run GSAE boundary detection on real Whisper-base activations for 3s clip; F1 > 0.7 on ≥3 phoneme boundaries

tasks.title: Silence x t* quantitative threshold: sweep silence_fraction → t* curve; inflection = hallucination risk threshold
tasks.definition_of_done: silence_tstar_threshold.py: sweep silence 0-100%; find inflection point where t* < 4 consistently; quantitative threshold

tasks.title: Attention entropy x AND-gate: identify commitment heads (low entropy + AND-gate dominant correlation)
tasks.definition_of_done: attn_entropy_gate_mock.py: mock per-head entropy × AND-frac; top-3 commitment heads identified; r < -0.6

tasks.title: Isolate(k) x beam diversity: higher Isolate at gc_peak → more diverse beam hypotheses
tasks.definition_of_done: isolate_beam_diversity_mock.py: Pearson r(Isolate_gc_peak, beam_entropy) > 0.6; audio-grounded = richer hypothesis space

tasks.title: VLM AND/OR gate analogy: image-grounded (AND) vs text-predictable (OR) features in Vision-Language Models
tasks.definition_of_done: Design doc: VLM RAVEL extension — image patches as audio analog; AND-frac proxy via patching causation; novelty case

tasks.title: gc(k) x SNR robustness: AND-gate features degrade faster under noise than OR-gate features
tasks.definition_of_done: snr_gate_mock.py: noise at SNR 0-30dB; AND-frac slope > 2x OR-frac slope; links to hearing degradation model

tasks.title: GCBench-14 generalization: t* boundary detector for speaker turns and musical onsets beyond phonemes
tasks.definition_of_done: Design doc: extend GCBench-14 to speaker diarization boundaries + musical note onsets; expected F1 transfer > 0.6

tasks.title: AND-frac scaling with Whisper model size: larger models → higher AND-frac at gc_peak?
tasks.definition_of_done: Design doc + mock: Whisper base→small→medium→large AND-frac at gc_peak trend; scaling law for audio commitment

tasks.title: FAD bias x accented speech: accented phonemes show lower AND-frac (treated as text-predictable by model)
tasks.definition_of_done: Design doc: accented vs native phoneme pairs → AND-frac hypothesis; AccentDB/L2-ARCTIC source; bias discrimination link

tasks.title: AND-gate steerability mock: activation patch to boost AND-frac for high-PPL phonemes → bias correction PoC
tasks.definition_of_done: steer_and_gate_mock.py: add direction vector to SAE feature; AND-frac increases ≥0.15; WER improves on mock
